===={{aniseries|JN}}====
[[File:Alain and Leon.png|thumb|250px|Leon and Alain]]
Alain made a cameo appearance in a flashback of the [[Lumiose Conference]] in ''[[JN108|Catching the Aura of Fate!]]''.

In ''[[JN109|Aim For The Eight!]]'', Alain was revealed to be in the Master Class of the [[World Coronation Series]], being the only non-Champion member of the season's final Masters Eight.

In ''[[JN115|Curtain Up! Fight the Fights!]]'', Alain participated in the [[Masters Eight Tournament]], along with the rest of the Masters Eight, reuniting with Ash, Diantha, and Steven, and meeting {{an|Iris}} and the rest of the regional Champions. His opponent was chosen to be {{an|Leon}}. Despite putting in his best efforts, Alain was eventually defeated by the [[Galar]] Champion and his {{TP|Leon|Charizard}}, making him the first Trainer to be eliminated from the tournament. In the [[JN116|following]] [[JN117|episodes]], Alain watched the rest of the quarterfinal matches with the other Masters Eight. In ''[[JN118|Battling as Hard as Stone!]]'', after Ash had emerged victorious against Steven, Alain met [[Goh]] and wished Ash good luck for the remainder of the competition before returning to Kalos.

In ''[[JN129|A Flood of Torrential Gains!]]'', Alain watched Ash's match against Leon alongside Charizard, Mairin, and Professor Sycamore.
